BEML Limited hereby informs that the Company has received a Letter of Intent for Design, Manufacture, Supply, Testing and commissionong of Standard gauge Metro Rolling stock for african region.

The order comprises of stainless steel standard gauge metro rolling stock valuing of approximately USD 60 Million.

This is the first ever order secured by BEML for supply of metro rolling stock
